subcodes.first_line: The dawn of hope hath broken, the morn of this Day is manifest, and the Most Exalted Pen speaketh forth these blessed words: God willing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: صبح امید دمید و فجر یوم ظاهر و قلم اعلی باین کلمه مبارکه ناطق انشاء الله در
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @knowledge; recognition of God
